subcodes.first_line: Grieve not for that which hath befallen, for should He wish it, He transmuteth hardship into ease and ordaineth whatsoever He willeth. Verily, He is the All-Powerful, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لا تحزن عما وقع انه لو یشاء یبدل العسر بالیسر و یقدر ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر القدیر محزون
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels
